scripts.check:3001: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$p=(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3001 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique); if($p){Get-Process -Id $p | Select-Object Id,ProcessName,Path}else{Write-Output 'PUERTO_LIBRE'}"
scripts.stop:3001: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$p=(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3001 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique); if($p){Stop-Process -Id $p -Force; Write-Output 'PROCESO_DETENIDO'}else{Write-Output 'NADA_EN_3001'}"
